note: Reviewed locally with the render-visual-reviewer rubric. No delegated subagent was used because this turn did not explicitly authorize multi-agent delegation.

artifact.role: AI-generated schematic roadmap, not empirical evidence

visible_evidence: The four-stage left-to-right method chain remains visible at ACL page scale.
Major labels are legible: USD / MDL Assets, noMDL Conversion, Paired VLM Evidence, and InternNav Evidence.
Stage 3 preserves Original, Converted, and Target: box while replacing the small VLM sentence with a question-mark icon.
Stage 4 keeps the floorplan, green/purple paths, and neutral SR/SPL/NE metric tiles without relying on a small legend.
The footer claim boundary remains readable and states that selected rollouts are qualitative.
risks: The panel is AI-generated schematic art, so it must remain captioned as a roadmap rather than measured render evidence.
The icon-only navigation path explanation is less explicit than v13, but the caption and later empirical InternNav figure carry the claim boundary.
promotion_decision: Promote v14 over v13 because it removes more generated microtext while preserving the same method-chain story and page-scale readability.
